description: Composition Black kurta, made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with curved slit, three quarter length sleeves with printed edging, side bust darts, printed panel at front with sequin decoration and side vents Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately as colour may bleed Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron Black gives a formal air to this kurta from aurelia while the gold and pink print and sequins around the neckline will draw eyes upwards to your face. A versatile design which can be worn from day to evening, use accessories to dress this kurta up or down. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 35”
